title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed editor now supports local AI models through LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp for running coding assistants directly on user machines. Users can run Gemma-4 12B and Qwen-3.6 models locally for code explanations, refactoring, and boilerplate generation while maintaining code privacy.
